description: YANG schema for the xFrame meta-model. This schema validates data model definition files (YAML/JSON) that define entities, fields, and relationships. Foreign keys reference the primary key of the referenced entity by default; optional ``field`` names a different target field that must be marked ``unique`` (alternate key).

data-model.description: Root container for data model definition

consolidated.description: Consolidated validation flag. Set to true for Phase 2 (combined cross-file validation) or false for Phase 1 (individual file validation). When true, file-scoped constraints (field limits, name limits) are skipped as they were already validated per-file. Used by MUST constraints to conditionally apply file-scoped validations.

description.description: AI-friendly description of the overall data model, its purpose, and main entities.

source.description: Optional documentation of where the model data comes from (e.g. URL, Excel file, API endpoint).

change_history.description:
Default change history retention policy for all entities.
         Can be overridden per entity. Default: 3 (keep last 3 change ids)

include_x_fields.description:
Include x-* extension fields in generated JSON Schema. When true, entity-level:
         x-primaryKey, x-created, x-modified, x-version, x-storage, x-validation.
         Field-level: x-primaryKey, x-foreignKey, x-parents, x-computed, x-confidence,
         x-source, x-minDate, x-maxDate.

allow_unlimited_fields.description: When present, allow entities to exceed the 7 non-array field limit. Omit when all entities have 7 or fewer non-array fields.

must.error-message: allow_unlimited_fields can only be set when at least one entity has more than 7 non-array fields. If all entities have 7 or fewer fields, omit this field.
must.description: When this flag is present, at least one entity must exceed the 7-field limit.

max_name_underscores.description: Maximum number of underscores allowed in entity and field names. Default is 2 (allowing names like 'entity_field_name' with max 3 components). This constraint helps maintain readable names and encourages proper entity boundaries. Names exceeding this limit suggest missing entity boundaries and should be restructured into separate entities with relationships.

exclude.description: List of strings to exclude data files from ingestion

index.description:
When present, consolidation writes one JSON file per primary-key instance under
           output/<entity-name>/ (readable, filesystem-safe form of the entity-store PK string,
           .json).
           Shards duplicate top-level nested instances after hierarchical nesting; the same
           records remain in consolidated_data.json data. sharded_entities lists those type
           names.

must.error-message: index can only be set on top-level entities. Remove index or remove parent_array from this entity's foreignKeys.
must.description: Disallow index on entities that define parent relationships via foreignKeys/parent_array (nested child entities).

must.error-message: Entity name exceeds the maximum underscore limit configured in max_name_underscores (default: 2). Deep names suggest missing entity boundaries - create proper entities instead.
must.description: Validates that entity name has at most max_name_underscores underscores (default: 2) to constrain hierarchical depth and reduce parsing complexity.

brief.description: Brief one-line summary of the entity

description.description: AI-friendly description of the entity type.

source.description: Optional documentation of where this entity's data comes from (e.g. URL, Excel sheet, API endpoint).

primary_key.description: Primary key field for this entity. Can be a simple field or a composite field.

brief.description: Brief one-line summary of the field. When type references a field_definition, may be specified at the reference site to override or supplement the definition's brief.

description.description: AI-friendly field description. When type references a field_definition, may be specified at the reference site to override or supplement the definition's description.

source.description: Optional documentation of where this field's data comes from (e.g. URL, Excel column name, API path).

required.description:
Whether this field is required in instance data. Only for entity fields and field_definitions;
         must not appear on composite subcomponents (requiredness is inherited from the enclosing field).

must.error-message: A required field cannot have a default value. If required is true, default must not be specified.
must.description: A required field cannot have a default value.

type.description: Field type: primitive, array or composite.

must.error-message: A reusable field_definition cannot reference another field_definition; define the type with primitive, array, or composite only.
must.description: Disallows the definition leafref case under type so field_definitions do not chain or recurse via name references.

choice.name: choice-type
choice.description: Primitive, array of elements, or composite object.

field.description: Optional: names a field on the referenced entity that this foreign key's value must match. When omitted, the referenced entity's primary key is used. Must not name the primary key (use omission for that case). When set, the named field must declare ``unique`` true (alternate key).

must.error-message: field must not name the referenced entity's primary key; omit field to reference the primary key.
must.description: When present, field must differ from the target entity's primary_key. Entity key via deref(../entity). Skipped when consolidated is false.

must.error-message: field must name a field on the referenced entity with unique true (alternate key). Set unique: true on that field in the model.
must.description: Non-primary foreign key targets must be explicitly marked unique: follow this leafref with deref(.) to fields/name, then sibling ../unique. Skipped when consolidated is false.

parent_array.description: Optional: Parent's array field name where children are nested. When specified, references a field on the referenced entity whose instance type includes a direct array branch (not only a field_definition reference).

must.error-message: parent_array must name a field on the referenced entity whose type uses the array branch directly (not via field_definitions); skipped when consolidated is false.
must.description: Requires a direct type/array container on the referenced field. Fields that only reference field_definitions are not checked here. Skipped when consolidated is false.

foreignKeys.description: Each entry points at an entity; values align with primary key unless ``field`` specifies another target field (which must be marked ``unique`` on the referenced entity).

definition.description: Reference to a reusable field_definition name on this entity.

field.description: Optional: names a field on the referenced entity that this foreign key's value must match. When omitted, the referenced entity's primary key is used. Must not name the primary key (use omission for that case). When set, the named field must declare ``unique`` true (alternate key).

must.error-message: field must not name the referenced entity's primary key; omit field to reference the primary key.
must.description: When present, field must differ from the target entity's primary_key. Entity key via deref(../entity). Skipped when consolidated is false.

must.error-message: field must name a field on the referenced entity with unique true (alternate key). Set unique: true on that field in the model.
must.description: Non-primary foreign key targets must be explicitly marked unique: follow this leafref with deref(.) to fields/name, then sibling ../unique. Skipped when consolidated is false.

parent_array.description: Optional: Parent's array field name where children are nested. When specified, references a field on the referenced entity whose instance type includes a direct array branch (not only a field_definition reference).

must.error-message: parent_array must name a field on the referenced entity whose type uses the array branch directly (not via field_definitions); skipped when consolidated is false.
must.description: Requires a direct type/array container on the referenced field. Fields that only reference field_definitions are not checked here. Skipped when consolidated is false.

foreignKeys.description: Each entry points at an entity; values align with primary key unless ``field`` specifies another target field (which must be marked ``unique`` on the referenced entity).

primitive-or-enum.description: Exactly one of open primitive typing or closed enum.

min.description: Minimum string length, or minimum value for integer, number, or year primitives.

max.description: Maximum string length, or maximum value for integer, number, or year primitives.

minDate.description: Minimum date (YYYY-MM-DD) for date or datetime primitive fields.

must.error-message: minDate can only be used with primitive type date or datetime
must.description: minDate applies only to date and datetime primitives.

must.error-message: minDate must be less than or equal to maxDate when both are specified
must.description: Ordering between minDate and maxDate.

maxDate.description: Maximum date (YYYY-MM-DD) for date or datetime primitive fields.

must.error-message: maxDate can only be used with primitive type date or datetime
must.description: maxDate applies only to date and datetime primitives.

must.error-message: maxDate must be greater than or equal to minDate when both are specified
must.description: Ordering between minDate and maxDate.

outlier.description:
Optional sigma multiplier for outlier flagging on numeric or date/datetime primitives.
             Omit to disable sigma-based outlier detection.

enum.description: Closed enumeration; primitive (string, integer, or number) is implied from member types.

oneOf.description: Primitive or closed enum (leaf primitive or leaf-list enum). Case name avoids clashing with leaf primitive in JSON.

field.description: Optional: names a field on the referenced entity that this foreign key's value must match. When omitted, the referenced entity's primary key is used. Must not name the primary key (use omission for that case). When set, the named field must declare ``unique`` true (alternate key).

must.error-message: field must not name the referenced entity's primary key; omit field to reference the primary key.
must.description: When present, field must differ from the target entity's primary_key. Entity key via deref(../entity). Skipped when consolidated is false.

must.error-message: field must name a field on the referenced entity with unique true (alternate key). Set unique: true on that field in the model.
must.description: Non-primary foreign key targets must be explicitly marked unique: follow this leafref with deref(.) to fields/name, then sibling ../unique. Skipped when consolidated is false.

must.error-message: parent_array must name a field on the referenced entity whose type uses the array branch directly (not via field_definitions); skipped when consolidated is false.
must.description: Requires a direct type/array container on the referenced field. Fields that only reference field_definitions are not checked here. Skipped when consolidated is false.

foreignKeys.description: Each entry points at an entity; values align with primary key unless ``field`` specifies another target field (which must be marked ``unique`` on the referenced entity).

array.description: Array field: homogeneous elements, each primitive or composite.

choice.name: choice-type
choice.description: Primitive, array of elements, or composite object.

oneOf.description: Array element: primitive or closed enum; case name avoids clashing with leaf primitive.

max.description: Maximum string length, or maximum value for integer, number, or year primitives.

must.description: Site-specific default at a definition reference is valid only for scalar reusable types.

         or type/definition when the referenced field_definition is itself primitive or enum.

must.error-message: When type references a field_definition, default is only allowed if that definition uses an open primitive or closed enum (not array, composite, or entity).
must.description: Site-specific default at a definition reference is valid only for scalar reusable types.

oneOf.description: Composite field: named subfields, each a full generic-field.

default.description:
Default value when the field is omitted in instance data. Valid for open primitive, closed enum,
         or type/definition when the referenced field_definition is itself primitive or enum.

must.error-message: When type references a field_definition, default is only allowed if that definition uses an open primitive or closed enum (not array, composite, or entity).
must.description: Site-specific default at a definition reference is valid only for scalar reusable types.

unique.description: When true, this field's values must be unique across all rows of the entity. Set on business or natural keys that may be referenced by foreignKeys.field on other entities. Only allowed when this field does not specify default (alternate keys must not use default).

validation.description: Per-field validation: enforce constraints or filter invalid values from consolidated output.

computed.description:
When present, the field value is derived from referenced fields using the given operation.
         Computed fields are read-only in JSON Schema and excluded from required_fields.

must.error-message: Binary operations (add, subtraction) require exactly 2 fields
must.description: Validates that binary operations have exactly 2 field references

must.must: (operation != 'min' and operation != 'max' and operation != 'average') or count(fields) >= 2
must.error-message: Aggregation operations (min, max, average) require at least 2 fields
must.description: Validates that aggregation operations have at least 2 field references

field.description: Referenced field name.

must.must: /data-model/consolidated = false() or ((not(../entity) and count(../../../../fields[name = current()]) = 1) or (../entity and count(deref(../entity)/../fields[name = current()]) = 1))
must.error-message: Computed field reference must exist in the specified entity (or current entity if not specified)
must.description: Validates that the field exists: in current entity when entity is omitted, or in referenced entity when entity is specified. Only enforced during consolidated validation (Phase 2) when cross-file references can be resolved.

must.error-message: Cross-entity computed field references require a foreign key field in the current entity that references the target entity
must.description: When entity is specified, there must be exactly one field in the current entity with a foreignKeys referencing this entity. Only enforced during consolidated validation (Phase 2) when cross-file references can be resolved.

fields.description: Field references for the computation (same entity or cross-entity with entity leaf).

must.must: ../../operation != 'average' or (not(current()/entity) and ../../../fields[name = current()/field]/type/primitive = ('integer', 'number')) or (current()/entity and /data-model/entities[name = current()/entity]/fields[name = current()/field]/type/primitive = ('integer', 'number'))
must.error-message: Average operation requires all referenced fields to have type integer or number
must.description: When operation is average, each referenced field (same-entity or cross-entity) must be numeric (integer or number). Only enforced during consolidated validation (Phase 2).

field_definitions.description: Optional reusable field type and constraint definitions for this entity. Entity fields may reference these by setting type to this name; when type is a definition name, min, max, etc. must not be set inline. Names are unique within this entity only.

brief.description: Brief one-line summary of the field. When type references a field_definition, may be specified at the reference site to override or supplement the definition's brief.

description.description: AI-friendly field description. When type references a field_definition, may be specified at the reference site to override or supplement the definition's description.

source.description: Optional documentation of where this field's data comes from (e.g. URL, Excel column name, API path).

required.description:
Whether this field is required in instance data. Only for entity fields and field_definitions;
         must not appear on composite subcomponents (requiredness is inherited from the enclosing field).

must.error-message: A required field cannot have a default value. If required is true, default must not be specified.
must.description: A required field cannot have a default value.

type.description: Field type: primitive, array or composite.

must.error-message: field must not name the referenced entity's primary key; omit field to reference the primary key.
must.description: When present, field must differ from the target entity's primary_key. Entity key via deref(../entity). Skipped when consolidated is false.

must.error-message: field must name a field on the referenced entity with unique true (alternate key). Set unique: true on that field in the model.
must.description: Non-primary foreign key targets must be explicitly marked unique: follow this leafref with deref(.) to fields/name, then sibling ../unique. Skipped when consolidated is false.

parent_array.description: Optional: Parent's array field name where children are nested. When specified, references a field on the referenced entity whose instance type includes a direct array branch (not only a field_definition reference).

must.error-message: parent_array must name a field on the referenced entity whose type uses the array branch directly (not via field_definitions); skipped when consolidated is false.
must.description: Requires a direct type/array container on the referenced field. Fields that only reference field_definitions are not checked here. Skipped when consolidated is false.

foreignKeys.description: Each entry points at an entity; values align with primary key unless ``field`` specifies another target field (which must be marked ``unique`` on the referenced entity).

primitive-or-enum.description: Exactly one of open primitive typing or closed enum.

min.description: Minimum string length, or minimum value for integer, number, or year primitives.

max.description: Maximum string length, or maximum value for integer, number, or year primitives.

minDate.description: Minimum date (YYYY-MM-DD) for date or datetime primitive fields.

must.error-message: minDate can only be used with primitive type date or datetime
must.description: minDate applies only to date and datetime primitives.

must.error-message: minDate must be less than or equal to maxDate when both are specified
must.description: Ordering between minDate and maxDate.

maxDate.description: Maximum date (YYYY-MM-DD) for date or datetime primitive fields.

must.error-message: maxDate can only be used with primitive type date or datetime
must.description: maxDate applies only to date and datetime primitives.

must.error-message: maxDate must be greater than or equal to minDate when both are specified
must.description: Ordering between minDate and maxDate.

outlier.description:
Optional sigma multiplier for outlier flagging on numeric or date/datetime primitives.
             Omit to disable sigma-based outlier detection.

enum.description: Closed enumeration; primitive (string, integer, or number) is implied from member types.

oneOf.description: Primitive or closed enum (leaf primitive or leaf-list enum). Case name avoids clashing with leaf primitive in JSON.

field.description: Optional: names a field on the referenced entity that this foreign key's value must match. When omitted, the referenced entity's primary key is used. Must not name the primary key (use omission for that case). When set, the named field must declare ``unique`` true (alternate key).

must.error-message: field must not name the referenced entity's primary key; omit field to reference the primary key.
must.description: When present, field must differ from the target entity's primary_key. Entity key via deref(../entity). Skipped when consolidated is false.

must.error-message: field must name a field on the referenced entity with unique true (alternate key). Set unique: true on that field in the model.
must.description: Non-primary foreign key targets must be explicitly marked unique: follow this leafref with deref(.) to fields/name, then sibling ../unique. Skipped when consolidated is false.

parent_array.description: Optional: Parent's array field name where children are nested. When specified, references a field on the referenced entity whose instance type includes a direct array branch (not only a field_definition reference).

must.error-message: parent_array must name a field on the referenced entity whose type uses the array branch directly (not via field_definitions); skipped when consolidated is false.
must.description: Requires a direct type/array container on the referenced field. Fields that only reference field_definitions are not checked here. Skipped when consolidated is false.

foreignKeys.description: Each entry points at an entity; values align with primary key unless ``field`` specifies another target field (which must be marked ``unique`` on the referenced entity).

array.description: Array field: homogeneous elements, each primitive or composite.

choice.name: choice-type
choice.description: Primitive, array of elements, or composite object.

oneOf.description: Array element: primitive or closed enum; case name avoids clashing with leaf primitive.

description.description: AI-friendly field description. When type references a field_definition, may be specified at the reference site to override or supplement the definition's description.

source.description: Optional documentation of where this field's data comes from (e.g. URL, Excel column name, API path).

must.error-message: When type references a field_definition, default is only allowed if that definition uses an open primitive or closed enum (not array, composite, or entity).
must.description: Site-specific default at a definition reference is valid only for scalar reusable types.

must.description: minDate applies only to date and datetime primitives.

must.description: Ordering between minDate and maxDate.

must.description: maxDate applies only to date and datetime primitives.

must.error-message: maxDate must be greater than or equal to minDate when both are specified
must.description: Ordering between minDate and maxDate.

foreignKeys.description: Each entry points at an entity; values align with primary key unless ``field`` specifies another target field (which must be marked ``unique`` on the referenced entity).

default.description:
Default value when the field is omitted in instance data. Valid for open primitive, closed enum,
         or type/definition when the referenced field_definition is itself primitive or enum.

must.error-message: When type references a field_definition, default is only allowed if that definition uses an open primitive or closed enum (not array, composite, or entity).
must.description: Site-specific default at a definition reference is valid only for scalar reusable types.

oneOf.description: Composite field: named subfields, each a full generic-field.

default.description:
Default value when the field is omitted in instance data. Valid for open primitive, closed enum,
         or type/definition when the referenced field_definition is itself primitive or enum.

must.error-message: When type references a field_definition, default is only allowed if that definition uses an open primitive or closed enum (not array, composite, or entity).
must.description: Site-specific default at a definition reference is valid only for scalar reusable types.

unique.description: When true, this field's values must be unique across all rows of the entity. Set on business or natural keys that may be referenced by foreignKeys.field on other entities. Only allowed when this field does not specify default (alternate keys must not use default).

validation.description: Per-field validation: enforce constraints or filter invalid values from consolidated output.

computed.description:
When present, the field value is derived from referenced fields using the given operation.
         Computed fields are read-only in JSON Schema and excluded from required_fields.

must.error-message: Binary operations (add, subtraction) require exactly 2 fields
must.description: Validates that binary operations have exactly 2 field references

must.must: (operation != 'min' and operation != 'max' and operation != 'average') or count(fields) >= 2
must.error-message: Aggregation operations (min, max, average) require at least 2 fields
must.description: Validates that aggregation operations have at least 2 field references

field.description: Referenced field name.

must.must: /data-model/consolidated = false() or ((not(../entity) and count(../../../../fields[name = current()]) = 1) or (../entity and count(deref(../entity)/../fields[name = current()]) = 1))
must.error-message: Computed field reference must exist in the specified entity (or current entity if not specified)
must.description: Validates that the field exists: in current entity when entity is omitted, or in referenced entity when entity is specified. Only enforced during consolidated validation (Phase 2) when cross-file references can be resolved.

must.error-message: Cross-entity computed field references require a foreign key field in the current entity that references the target entity
must.description: When entity is specified, there must be exactly one field in the current entity with a foreignKeys referencing this entity. Only enforced during consolidated validation (Phase 2) when cross-file references can be resolved.

fields.description: Field references for the computation (same entity or cross-entity with entity leaf).

must.must: ../../operation != 'average' or (not(current()/entity) and ../../../fields[name = current()/field]/type/primitive = ('integer', 'number')) or (current()/entity and /data-model/entities[name = current()/entity]/fields[name = current()/field]/type/primitive = ('integer', 'number'))
must.error-message: Average operation requires all referenced fields to have type integer or number
must.description: When operation is average, each referenced field (same-entity or cross-entity) must be numeric (integer or number). Only enforced during consolidated validation (Phase 2).

fields.description: List of field definitions for this entity. Best practice: limit to 7 non-array fields per entity to encourage proper abstraction. Array fields (type: 'array') are excluded from this count as they represent relationships to child entities, not direct attributes. This constraint can be bypassed by setting allow_unlimited_fields (present) on the data model.

must.must: /data-model/consolidated = false() or count(/data-model/entities/field_definitions[name = current()/type/definition]) = 0 or (not(current()/type/min) and not(current()/type/max) and not(current()/type/minDate) and not(current()/type/maxDate) and count(current()/type/enum) = 0 and count(current()/type/array) = 0 and count(current()/type/composite) = 0)
must.error-message: When type references a field_definition, min, max, minDate, maxDate, enum, array, composite, and other inline type branches must not be specified (description, brief, and default may be used at the reference site).
must.description: Inline type constraints are inherited from the definition; when type uses the definition leafref do not repeat primitive branches at the reference site. Enforced only during consolidated validation (Phase 2). description, brief, and optional default may be specified at the reference site.

change_history.description: Change history retention policy for this entity. Overrides model-level default.

v.description: Model version of this entity, added during consolidation. NOTE: This field is automatically added during consolidation and should NOT be included in source YAML files.

c.description: Change ID when this entity was created. NOTE: This field is automatically added during consolidation and should NOT be included in source YAML files.

must.error-message: c must reference a valid change ID in the changes list
must.description: c must reference a valid change ID in the changes list. Only enforced during consolidated validation (Phase 2) when change IDs are available.

m.description:
List of change IDs when this entity was modified (history). The size of this list is controlled by the change_history policy.
                     NOTE: This field is automatically added during consolidation and should NOT be included in source YAML files.

must.error-message: Each m value must reference a valid change ID in the changes list
must.description: Each m value must reference a valid change ID in the changes list. Only enforced during consolidated validation (Phase 2) when change IDs are available.

rate_of_change.description: Expected rate of change for this entity type, indicating what is considered 'normal' change frequency (e.g., hourly, daily, quarterly)

tools.description: Optional list of tools that can provide additional details about this entity, such as real-time streaming telemetry or historical data

validation.description: Data validation mode for this entity

storage.description: Storage type for entity data. INDEXED_KV uses CloudFlare Key-Value store with an index key (entityname:index) containing the primary key values of value keys (entityname:primary_key_1, ...). GITHUB_PR uses GitHub pull request storage.

must.error-message: Entity has more than 7 non-array fields. Array fields are excluded from this count as they represent relationships to child entities. Consider splitting into multiple entities with foreign key relationships, or set allow_unlimited_fields (present) to bypass this limit.
must.description: Validates that entity has at most 7 non-array fields, unless allow_unlimited_fields is present. Field limits are enforced in Phase 1 (individual file validation, consolidated=false) using the file's allow_unlimited_fields flag. In Phase 2 (combined validation, consolidated=true), this constraint is skipped as field limits are already validated per-file.

git_commit_hash.description: Git commit hash corresponding to this change

changes.description: Change tracking records. NOTE: This list is automatically generated during consolidation and should NOT be included in source YAML files.

date-and-time.description: ISO 8601 date and time in format YYYY-MM-DDTHH:mm:ss[.sss][Z|±HH:mm]

entity-name.description: Entity name (letters, digits, underscores only, lowercase). The underscore count limit is configurable via max_name_underscores property (default: 2).

version-string.description: Version string in format YY.MM.DD.N, auto-incremented during consolidation when changes are detected

rate-of-change.description: Expected rate of change for an entity, indicating what is considered 'normal' change frequency

change-history-policy.description:
Change history retention policy. Can be:
       - An integer N: Keep last N modification change IDs (default: 3)
       - '*': Keep infinite history
       - 0: Disabled (no modification history tracked)

field-name.description: Field name for computed references and leafrefs (same rules as entity fields).

field-validation-mode.description:
Field validation mode. 'enforce' (default) — constraints are enforced during validation;
       'filter' — invalid field value is omitted from consolidated output.
